name: Haru to Ao no Obentou-bako
original_name: ハルとアオのお弁当箱
overview: Haru is an otaku girl who has no interest in food or clothes—she'd rather spend her money on her own hobbies. This changes when she meets a genderless boy, Ao. Their story begins with them creating delicious bento boxes together.

trailers.title: ドラマ 「ハルとアオのお弁当箱」第1話 | ＢＳテレ東
